operational_definition: Local steepness and downslope compass orientation using the selected terra neighborhood.
principal_interpretation_constraint: Slope depends on grid spacing; aspect is circular and reverses after vertical-sign inversion.

implementation_source: Local cosine/sine transforms of terra aspect
operational_definition: cos(aspect) and sin(aspect), with aspect expressed in radians.
Local maximum minus minimum elevation in terra's terrain neighborhood.
principal_interpretation_constraint: Definition, grid resolution, and neighborhood support affect values.

operational_definition: terra's local terrain ruggedness index based on elevation differences.
principal_interpretation_constraint: Compare only across compatible grid resolution and terrain support.

operational_definition: Focal value relative to terra's local neighborhood mean.
principal_interpretation_constraint: Sign and interpretation depend on stored vertical convention.

operational_definition: Focal value minus focal-neighborhood mean; optional normalization divides by focal sample SD.
units: input vertical units; normalized option unitless
neighbourhood_or_scale: square 3 by 3 and 11 by 11 defaults; projected map-unit annulus optional
principal_interpretation_constraint: Square windows include the focal cell; map-unit annuli require a projected CRS and stated radii.

implementation_source: Local slope/aspect normal-vector formula with terra::focal
operational_definition: 1 minus the magnitude of the focal mean of slope/aspect-derived unit-normal components.
principal_interpretation_constraint: Uses available normal-vector cells, but derivative boundaries can remain missing.

operational_definition: Sum of four orthogonal neighbors minus four times the focal value.
principal_interpretation_constraint: Unscaled by cell dimensions; not plan, profile, mean, or Gaussian curvature.

implementation_source: Local slope-secant formula using terra slope
operational_definition: 1/cos(local slope), after a lower cosine clamp of 1e-6.
principal_interpretation_constraint: Approximation, not a triangulated or directly measured benthic surface area.
